samples.text: All trees are plants. A lamp is not a tree. Therefore, is a lamp a plant?
Every tree belongs to the category of plants. A lamp is not a tree. Does it follow that a lamp is a plant?
All woody plants are plants. A desk lamp is not a woody plant. Therefore, is a desk lamp a plant?
A lamp is not in the group of trees. Only trees are stated to be plants here. Based on this, is a lamp a plant?
All trees are plants. A lamp is not a tree. Someone left the door open earlier. Therefore, is a lamp a plant?
